title: Antirhea bifurcata
taxonomy: Antirhea bifurcata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Antirhea, which is native to the Caribbean and Central America. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the madder or coffee family. This family includes many species of flowering plants, including coffee, gardenias, and periwinkles. The classification of Antirhea bifurcata reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Rubiaceae family.
